docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $266.37 FILED BY LINLEY, ORRIS AS TO DEFENDANT SAM'S APPLIANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
INVALID SERVICE AS TO SAM'S APPLIANCE, NO DESCRIPTION OF PARTY SERVED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINLEY, ORRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAM'S APPLIANCE $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES IMPROPER SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAM'S APPLIANCE
